interface.longDescription: Komoot is a leading outdoor adventure and route-planning platform built to help people plan and experience activities beyond the everyday route. It supports a wide range of sports—from all types of cycling to jogging, hiking, and more—and offers access to around 7 million routes worldwide. Along these routes, users can discover nearly 5 million highlights: community-curated points of interest that make each adventure more meaningful. Both routes and highlights include images, ratings, and comments shared by a community of 50 million people. With komoot, discovering new places and shaping your own outdoor adventures comes naturally.
defaultPrompt: Top best routes to see Tre Cime di Lavaredo
